title: Statistical Methods for Biomedical Data
description: We develop statistical methods for complex biomedical data, including high-dimensional, structured, and survival outcomes.
Our work emphasizes rigorous inference, reproducible analysis, and practical tools for biomedical research.
alt: Power curves from microbiome statistical method evaluation

title: Multi-omics and Epigenetics
description: We analyze molecular data such as DNA methylation, genetic variation, and other omics layers to study disease-related biological signals.
We are especially interested in integrative approaches that connect molecular profiles to clinical phenotypes.
alt: Omics analysis scatter plot from biomedical research

title: Respiratory Disease and COPD Data Science
description: We study respiratory disease using genetic, imaging, omics, and clinical data.
Our work includes COPD-related phenotypes such as lung function, emphysema, mucus plugging, and disease progression.
alt: Chest CT examples of mucus plugs from COPD research

title: Biomedical AI and Prediction Modeling
description: We develop and evaluate prediction models for biomedical and clinical outcomes.
The lab is interested in survival prediction, interpretable machine learning, and robust validation of AI-based biomedical models.
alt: Tree-based microbiome method figure with model diagnostics

title: Environmental Health and Policy Data Science
description: We apply statistical and data science methods to environmental health and policy-related problems.
This includes study design, survey analysis, sampling strategy, and quantitative evaluation of stakeholder perceptions and policy feasibility.
alt: Colorful composition plot from biomedical and environmental data analysis

relatedWork.label: Smart safety equipment certification criteria project
